name: google-ads-copy
description: Write three complete Google Responsive Search Ad sets with 15 headlines and 4 descriptions each, following Google Ads character limits and best practices.
input_description: Product or service, target keyword, target audience, unique selling points, landing page URL (optional), and campaign goal (conversions, traffic, brand awareness).
output_description: Three RSA ad sets in Markdown, each with 15 headlines (30 characters max), 4 descriptions (90 characters max), a display URL path suggestion, and a brief pinning strategy note.
